script_inferred_network_endpoints.reason: index.js posts the serialized network form to /API/PTCmd when SendNetwork is clicked.
index.js posts 'ds' to /API/PTCmd when SaveNetwork is clicked.
index.js posts 'df&r' to /API/PTCmd when ResetNetwork is clicked.

warnings: This script only generates a migration plan. It does not write PTU network settings.
Changing PTU network settings can drop the current HTTP session immediately.
The web UI suggests Set/Save/Reset network actions exist, but this project does not execute them by default.
